public_objects.meaning: frozen reading surface bound to a tag or exact locked ref
integrity source for repository content verification
specific DOI-backed public object rather than the whole moving repo
public reading surface adjacent to, but not replacing, the normative core

rules: Cite the repo when referring to an evolving corpus surface.
Cite the tag or locked snapshot when referring to a frozen reading surface.
Cite the DOI when a specific DOI-backed public object is the object of reference.
Cite the exact document when making a narrow claim about one protocol, note, or package.
anti_confusions: GitHub-generated archive != integrity source of truth
minimal_verification_path: Prefer stable tags and the current stack lock.
Prefer repo hash manifests over archive-level assumptions.
Verify exact file presence and manifest alignment.
Do not rely on screenshots or secondary summaries.
If in doubt, fall back to local verification.
